attacking_style: Demonstrates ability to make early, elite selections in breakaway moves but durability remains unproven when facing extended efforts.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns; appears to operate in breakaway scenarios requiring independent positioning.
terrain_preference: Capable of handling terrain selective enough for five-man groups, but physical limitations prevent conclusive terrain assessment.
vulnerability: Physical resilience in extended efforts is a critical weakness; illness or deteriorating condition forces abandonment even from advantageous positions.
key_patterns: Capable of making highly selective early breakaway moves in Grand Tour stages.
Physical condition overrides tactical positioning advantages when illness or fatigue sets in.
Unable to sustain efforts in small groups despite initial selection capability.
form_trajectory: negative: illness compromised performance during Giro despite strong initial positioning, suggesting declining or compromised condition
